title: Organic Act of Guam
text:
ORGANIC ACT OF GUAM
ORGANIC ACT OF GUAM
TITLE 48 TERRITORIES AND INSULAR POSSESSIONS
CHAPTER 8A GUAM
2025 NOTE: The Organic Act of Guam is codified at Chapter 8A of Title 48 United States Code; specifically, 48
U.S.C. § 1421 et seq. The most updated version of the Organic Act is accessible through the Office of Law Revision
Counsel website: https://uscode.house.gov/browse/prelim@title48/chapter8A&edition=prelim.
----------
1
COL 2025-04-22
